text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri Mar 29 02:03:32 2013
New Revision: 315518

Log:
  - Update to 2.1

Modified:

  head/devel/py-hgtools/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-hgtools/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-hgtools/Makefile	Fri Mar 29 01:51:02 2013	(r315517)
+++ head/devel/py-hgtools/Makefile	Fri Mar 29 02:03:32 2013	(r315518)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	hgtools
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ COMMENT=	Classes and setuptools plugin f
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 USE_ZIP=	yes
-USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
 PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%

==============================================================================
